brand.name: SARvision
brand.style_note: 1980s broadcast-perfume confidence over an analog signal-noir evidence board.
brand.tagline: A signal-forward view of the molecule before the make.

co_lead.role: orthogonal co-lead — de-risks single-scaffold failure + independently validates the mechanism; also the positive control that every binding/selectivity pipeline must read correctly.
co_lead.structure: oxindole-thiazolidinone (Dou 2019, CAS 2366255-71-0) — different scaffold, SAME modular pharmacophore (o-Cl-phenyl in pocket I).
co_lead.wet_data: >2500x JNK3-selective, hERG-clean, neuroprotective in AD models.

lead.narrative: JTX005 is the N-demethylated primary amide of JTX002: removing a single N-methyl turns a ~43x mono-selective compound (JTX002: JNK3 20 nM, JNK2 860, JNK1 1000) into a >=476x DUAL JNK1/JNK2-selective one (JTX005: JNK3 21 nM, JNK1 & JNK2 both >=10 uM). Both warheads dock the o-Cl-phenyl identically against L144, so the added selectivity is ENERGETIC (desolvation / isoform-differential electrostatics), not geometric -- docking and plain MD cannot rank it; alchemical RBFE is the only decisive instrument. O1 calibration recovered it: dddG(J1-J3) = -5.43 kcal/mol (6.1 sigma, exceeds the wet >=476x floor) and dddG(J2-J3) = -2.00 kcal/mol (J3-favoring at full sampling). The instrument is now trusted to rank JTX005 analogs on both axes.
lead.proven: structure verified by RDKit SMARTS against cyrus/jtx_ic50_summary.json on 2026-06-04: primary_amide=True, carboxylic_acid=False, formula C18H12ClFN4OS.
lead.short: primary amide · JNK3 21 nM · >=476x dual JNK1/2-sel
lead.wet_data: JNK3 21 nM; JNK1 & JNK2 both >=10000 nM => >=476x DUAL-selective (a CENSORED lower bound — JNK1/2 pinned at the 10 uM assay ceiling).
lead.why_lead: the only wet-validated DUAL JNK1+JNK2 selective compound; the campaign's empirical anchor and the IP asset to license.

mechanism.jnk1_vs_jnk2: The selectivity problem is specifically JNK2. vs-JNK1 (L144->I106) is crystallographically solid + JNK1 >=100x in 16/26 panel compounds; vs-JNK2 (M115->L77) is only half-supported, JNK2 tops ~24x median.
mechanism.pharmacophore: MODULAR + crystal-validated: a bidentate Met149 hinge anchor (conserved -> carries AFFINITY; core is swappable for developability) + an o-Cl-phenyl warhead in pocket I (carries SELECTIVITY). The two are separable.
mechanism.selectivity_is_energetic: The JTX002->JTX005 edge is N-METHYL-AMIDE -> PRIMARY AMIDE (N-demethylation); both warheads place the chlorophenyl identically against L144 and the amide head sits in a CONSERVED sub-pocket making no divergent steric contact. So the added dual selectivity is ENERGETIC (desolvation / isoform-differential electrostatics), not geometric => docking and plain MD cannot rank it; alchemical free-energy (RBFE) is the only decisive instrument.

campaign_objectives.mission: Convert compute into drugs: design a selective JNK3 inhibitor worth licensing — not watch cold silicon mold.

objectives.decisive_experiment: 3-leg ddG(JTX002->JTX005) in JNK3/JNK1/JNK2; the double-difference dddG = selectivity.

objectives.moves: warhead extension to reach M115 (~5-6 A today). WHQ co-crystal 8VNX proves one warhead can touch all three: L144 2.4 / M115 3.9 / I92 3.2 A.
objectives.statement: Stack a SECOND, orthogonal selectivity mechanism: grow the warhead to directly engage M115 (the JNK2 discriminator), adding a STERIC JNK2 lever on top of the primary-amide's ENERGETIC one. Two orthogonal mechanisms = robust large dual selectivity instead of a single conserved-pocket electrostatic effect.
objectives.status: EMPIRICAL FLAG against naive M115-fill, decision-grade on ONE compound, directional on a second. (1) DECISION-GRADE: JX_O3O2_4Me_pyridyl (J2=-0.81+/-0.24@198, J3=+1.52+/-0.53@199) gives dddG(J2-J3) = -2.33 kcal/mol ANTI-O3-SELECTIVE — hydrophobic 4-Me M115 fill engages JNK2 more than it helps JNK3, cutting against JNK2 selectivity. (2) DIRECTIONAL CORROBORATION (NOT decision-grade): JX_O3_1_4Me/J2 trends anti-selective (J2 binds tighter) across every read, but it NEVER gate-passed at adequate sampling — RECONCILED 2026-06-17: the prose previously cited -2.87+/-0.96 as a clean pass, but that was the EARLIEST read at only 46 spr; richer sampling drifted it (-2.15+/-0.62@89, -2.40+/-0.56@133) and gate-FAILED, and the CURRENT committed verdict is a low-spr checkpoint regression (-0.91+/-1.35@43, gate.fail; an L40-class clobber that lost the 133-spr richest read). So compound-1's J2 is anti-selective in DIRECTION only; the load-bearing O3 evidence is compound (1) JX_O3O2_4Me_pyridyl. **JX_O3_1_4Me's J3 arm would close the dddG on the second compound but is itself under-sampled (40/200) — lower-value than the JX_O3_4_4F vector below.** Updated guidance: deprioritize 4-Me/4-Et hydrophobic fill; the cleaner live O3 vector is the JX_O3_4_4F small-electronegative-fluorine sub-axis, and an alternative orthogonal vector (polar-handle / sigma-hole / shape-only) deserves design enumeration to avoid the M115-fill anti-selectivity trap.
objectives.success_criterion: a design that RBFE-predicts added JNK2 selectivity without losing JNK1 selectivity or JNK3 affinity.
objectives.title: Raise the JNK2 selectivity ceiling (JNK1 is largely solved)

objectives.moves: map isoform divergence BY structural region (quantify the headroom) + cryptic/allosteric pocket detection on the JNK3 ensemble. Cheap de-risk first: is Cys117 (5.4 A from M115) isoform-divergent + solvent-accessible for a reversible-covalent lever?
objectives.statement: The ATP site is ~98% identical so dual selectivity there is a tiny squeezed margin. Isoform divergence is far higher OUTSIDE the cleft: the MAPK insert (307-316), the D-recruitment/docking groove, the substrate-binding groove. This is where the chemical space actually opens up.
objectives.status: TOOLING LANDED, decisive MD PENDING an idle GPU. The cryptic-pocket instrument shipped 2026-06-17 (commit f7efe564f4): `sdf md cryptic-apo` launcher + src/sdf/md/cryptic_apo.py (fresh APO JNK3 MD, amber14 ff14SB/tip3p, 4fs HMR, +/-benzene/ipa/phenol cosolvent) + src/sdf/analysis/mdpocket_cryptic.py (two-pass mdpocket, per-frame transient-pocket grid filtered by proximity to JNK3-unique CA centroids). The decisive experiment recipe + ranked target-surface manifest are fully specified in docs/baton/o4_frontier_cryptic_pocket_20260617T0135Z.md (PRIMARY surface = C_lobe_upper/Cys202 face -- the only JNK3-unique surface distance-bridgeable to the ATP warhead at ~19.4A, carrying a true JNK3-unique Cys202 lever; secondary = MAPK insert; two long-shots). Static off-ATP de-risks are all NEGATIVE and settled (Cys117 conserved, Q158H non-contact, 307-316 static drugScore ~0.000, full CA divergence scan done). The single OPEN question -- does a cryptic/transient druggable pocket open on a JNK3-unique surface under MD -- needs the 200ns+ APO run, which is held for a dedicated idle/reapable GPU box (must NOT displace O1/O2/O3 fleet GPU). Prior on success honestly LOW (~10-15%). Pending obligation dob_91bef1fd549d (gpu-box lane, result-returned: tooling landed, MD not yet executed).
objectives.title: Step off the squeezed ATP margin — allosteric / non-ATP selectivity
objectives.why_it_matters: Larger selectivity headroom + a differentiated, non-ATP-competitive mechanism + open IP space; the antidote to local-minimum polishing. STRATEGY names this the highest-value compute to spend next.

campaign_objectives.ownership: Objectives (the list, ranks, statements) are OPERATOR-AUTHORITY. The campaign-integrator keeps each objective's `status` field current every pass and may append evidence; it does NOT re-rank or rewrite statements without an operator directive. This file is the SINGLE source of truth for 'what is the campaign trying to achieve' — sartop / possedash / sarviz read it; nothing hardcodes a goal string.

retired_framings.framing: dethrone CY06 / the CY de-novo series as leads
retired_framings.why: cy06 is mid-pack (~8th of 12), NOT a lead — it was elevated by BROKEN assays + an ADMET/CNS argument, not binding superiority. The whole CY series is a flat congeneric fan around the JTX core (gnina CNN spread < noise floor; no member has wet IC50; the most-developed heir C3v22 had its selectivity FALSIFIED as a free-dock artifact). It does not earn the campaign's expensive physics. CY06 is a reference point, nothing more. The program is to OPTIMIZE JTX005, not to keep dethroning it with undifferentiated de-novo scaffolds.

retired_framings.framing: the carboxylic ACID drives JTX005 selectivity
retired_framings.why: misidentified-structure error. RDKit-proven from the assay registry: JTX005 is a PRIMARY AMIDE (not an acid); the carboxylic acid is JTX001, which is the WEAKEST member (147 nM). The selectivity-driving edge is JTX002->JTX005 = N-DEMETHYLATION (N-methyl-amide -> primary amide), not amide->acid. Any 'bioisostere the acid' design advice inherited from this error is void.

layout_contract: top deck: decision annunciator and recommended action
instrument strip: rank plateau, primary signal, graph coverage, pose/water gaps
supporting deck: action ladder, candidate matrix, mechanism map, chemistry manifold
lower deck: pose/contact/water evidence and source artifacts
semantic_guardrails: separate current actionable candidate from historical peak or panel-local winners
do not present SAR liveness, queue activity, or docking affinity as rank progress
rank candidates by paired-model relative dG in an RBFE-anchored reference frame when available
treat docking affinity as operations context when paired-model evidence is present
withhold geometry and water claims when source pose or explicit-water artifacts are missing
reporting_pattern.summary: Use a driver-cockpit reporting hierarchy: one dominant decision annunciator, terse instrument readouts, paired-model rank semantics above ops context, and Tufte-style evidence ledgers below the first-screen recommendation.

torsion_solver_recommendation.fallback: Use constrained semiempirical quantum torsion scans for unsupported elements, charged edge cases, or high-stakes handoff claims.
torsion_solver_recommendation.policy: Do not use low-theory force fields or shortcut charge modes; preserve the existing high-quality charge policy.
torsion_solver_recommendation.primary: Constrained neural-potential torsion relaxation before any geometry-facing SAR claim
torsion_solver_recommendation.why: Use a neural-network potential trained to approximate quantum-mechanical energies/forces. It should cover the halogenated JTY chemistry class and run as a fast torsion relaxation screen before escalating ambiguous cases to semiempirical or higher-theory quantum scans.

torsional_stress_graph_probe.hard_decision_rule: Do not call this a formal analysis lane, promote a mechanism, or update global SAR rank until canonicalized PBCNet replay plus repeat/analog evidence resolves warning-class deltas.
torsional_stress_graph_probe.probe_definition: Perturb observed docked poses with guarded higher-theory torsion relaxation, redock guard failures, replay paired-model pose-state edges, and classify the collective graph response as a falsification probe before changing SAR continuity.
torsional_stress_graph_probe.rank_rule: A favorable paired-model edge is not sufficient. Emergent SAR mechanism requires geometry coherence, graph coherence, and reproducibility through canonicalized replay. Near-identical pose states with large paired-model deltas are determinism/input-state warnings.
torsional_stress_graph_probe.required_next_action: run guarded torsion stress on admitted graph nodes before claiming a graph-level readout
